concerns.text: Spec requires GEO series and Metabolomics Workbench experiments for plant defense studies. research.md reports 'NO VERIFIED SOURCE' - verified datasets block contains ONLY medical RMSE parquet files from HuggingFace, not plant genomic/transcriptomic data. Plan documents FR-SC coverage but cannot execute without plant omics data sources.

Dataset Strategy table shows all 4 dataset types (GEO Arabidopsis, GEO Solanum, Metabolomics Workbench, KEGG) as '⚠️ NO VERIFIED SOURCE'. Spec FR-001/FR-002 require these sources; without verified plant omics datasets, the pipeline cannot proceed as specified.
